scripts.lint: uv run ruff check src/ tests/
scripts.format: uv run ruff format src/ tests/
scripts.format:check: uv run ruff format --check src/ tests/
scripts.test: uv run python -m pytest tests/unit/ tests/integration/ tests/e2e/ -q --basetemp ../.pytest-tmp-kicad-mcp-pro-full --cov=kicad_mcp --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=xml --cov-fail-under=90
scripts.package:check: uv build && uv run python scripts/check_package_metadata.py
scripts.security:bandit: uv run python -m bandit -r src/ -ll -s B104
scripts.security: pnpm run security:bandit && pnpm run security:audit
scripts.check: pnpm run metadata:check && pnpm run release:check && pnpm run compat:check && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run security && pnpm run workflows:lint && pnpm run workflows:security && pnpm run release:dry-run && pnpm run build
scripts.check:ci: pnpm run metadata:check && pnpm run release:check && pnpm run compat:check && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run security && pnpm run workflows:lint && pnpm run workflows:security && pnpm run release:dry-run && pnpm run build
scripts.hooks:pre-commit: uv run python scripts/hook_pre_commit.py && pnpm run metadata:check
scripts.hooks:pre-push: pnpm run metadata:check && pnpm run release:check && pnpm run compat:check && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run workflows:lint
scripts.release:dry-run: pnpm run metadata:check && pnpm run release:check
